intro: This Privacy Policy explains how New York State ITS collects, uses, and protects the information you provide when using GovArc Support. We are committed to safeguarding your privacy and handling your data responsibly.

sections.title: Information We Collect
paragraphs: We collect only the information needed to help you resolve account and support issues.
list: Contact details such as your name and email address
Account identifiers used to verify your identity
Support requests and the messages you send us
Technical data such as browser type and pages visited

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
paragraphs: Your information is used to provide and improve GovArc Support services.
list: Verify your identity and process account recovery
Detect and prevent fraud or abuse
Improve the accessibility and reliability of our services

sections.title: Data Security
paragraphs: We apply administrative, technical, and physical safeguards designed to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or loss.

sections.title: Information Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with authorized state entities and service providers as needed to deliver services, or when required by law.

sections.title: Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain your information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy and to meet legal and regulatory requirements.

sections.title: Your Rights
paragraphs: Depending on your circumstances, you may have the right to:
list: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request deletion where permitted by law
Ask questions about how your data is handled

securityCallout.title: Security Measures
securityCallout.body: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, access is limited to authorized personnel, and our systems are monitored and regularly assessed for vulnerabilities.

contact.title: Questions about this policy?
contact.body: Contact the NYS ITS Privacy Office and we'll be glad to help.
